scripts.postinstall: cd apigateway && npm install && cd ../user-service && npm install && cd ../tickets-service && npm install && cd ../groups-service && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,USERS,TICKETS,GROUPS" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold" "cd apigateway && node server.js" "cd user-service && node server.js" "cd tickets-service && node server.js" "cd groups-service && node server.js"
